items.title: xAI Launches Standalone Grok Speech-to-Text and Text-to-Speech APIs, Targeting Enterprise Voice Developers
items.summary:
Elon Musk’s AI company xAI has launched two standalone audio APIs — a Speech-to-Text (STT) API and a Text-to-Speech (TTS) API — both built on the same infrastructure that powers Grok Voice on mobile apps, Tesla vehicles, and Starlink customer support. The release moves xAI squarely into the competitive speech API market currently occupied by […]
The post xAI Launches Standalone Grok Speech-to-Text and Text-to-Speech APIs, Targeting Enterprise Voice Developers appeared first on MarkTechPost.

items.title: NVIDIA Releases Ising: the First Open Quantum AI Model Family for Hybrid Quantum-Classical Systems
items.summary:
Quantum computing has spent years living in the future tense. Hardware has improved, research has compounded, and venture dollars have followed — but the gap between a quantum processor running in a lab and one running a real-world application remains stubbornly wide. NVIDIA moved to close that gap with the launch of NVIDIA Ising, the […]
The post NVIDIA Releases Ising: the First Open Quantum AI Model Family for Hybrid Quantum-Classical Systems appeared first on MarkTechPost.

items.title: A Coding Tutorial for Running PrismML Bonsai 1-Bit LLM on CUDA with GGUF, Benchmarking, Chat, JSON, and RAG
items.summary:
In this tutorial, we implement how to run the Bonsai 1-bit large language model efficiently using GPU acceleration and PrismML’s optimized GGUF deployment stack. We set up the environment, install the required dependencies, and download the prebuilt llama.cpp binaries, and load the Bonsai-1.7B model for fast inference on CUDA. As we progress, we examine how […]
The post A Coding Tutorial for Running PrismML Bonsai 1-Bit LLM on CUDA with GGUF, Benchmarking, Chat, JSON, and RAG appeared first on MarkTechPost.

items.title: Humanity's Last Exam (HLE) is a multi-modal academic benchmark with 2,500 questions across mathematics, humanities, and natural sciences, designed to test LLM capabilities at the frontier of human knowledge with unambiguous, verifiable solutions
